description: 4 fragments of a ketubah from 1106. The bride is Sitt al-Dar b. Yefet. The groom is Eli b. Yehezkel ha-Haver be-Sanhedrin Gedola. Contains also a dowry list. Signed by: Mevorakh b. Isaac, Isaac b. Ghalib, Efrayim b. Sasson, A[vraha]m b. Shabetay, Yiṣḥaq b. Shemu'el, Elya b. Daniel, Israel b. Shlomo, Shemaryah Hakohen b. Natan, Yosef b. Isaac (his father name is only partly preserved), Halfo[n] b. Mevorakh (in a very crude hand with error in spelling חלפו בר מברך). AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
